hero.eyebrow: Unofficial fan research and development atlas
hero.headline: Welcome to the resort operations desk.
hero.subheadline: A public, data-driven hub for island reconstruction research, compatibility testing, active features, and curated bugs for a fan-made resort game project.

cards.title: Explore the Island
cards.summary: Rotate a 3D island view, select points of interest, and see evidence, confidence, assets needed, and implementation status.

cards.title: Trace Round Trips
cards.summary: Follow data-driven transfer routes from game to resort and back, with status colors and linked issues.

cards.title: Watch Features Land
cards.summary: Track active work using resort-airport stages, subtasks, linked bugs, and progress indicators.

cards.title: Visit the Issue Desk
cards.summary: Browse curated issues without comments, noise, or live submissions. Just useful status, severity, and checklists.

featuredMedia.caption: Original on-flight planning sketch used to shape the project board.
Early compatibility planning map, now represented as a data-driven graph.

weeklyPulse: 3 research points need stronger evidence labels.
2 transfer routes are blocked by self-travel bugs.
The island model viewport is ready for a GLB replacement when the model lands.
